preconditions: Database seeded with E12-3 default templates (14 templates for test company)
User authenticated as ADMIN with system module access
Puppeteer/PDF generation service initialised on API

journeys.name: Navigate to Document Templates Page
journeys.description: Verify the Document Templates page is accessible via sidebar navigation, loads with correct T7 Settings layout, breadcrumbs, and displays seeded default templates

steps.expected_result: Application dashboard loads with sidebar visible
System navigation section expands showing sub-items

steps.target: Document Templates link in sidebar (FileText icon)
steps.expected_result: Page navigates to /settings/document-templates
steps.visual_check: T7 Settings layout visible with breadcrumb 'System > Document Templates', page title 'Document Templates', and template list grouped by document type. Purple 'Add Template' button in top-right. Concept D background #f4f2ff visible.

steps.expected_result: Breadcrumb shows 'System' and 'Document Templates'
Add Template button is visible with purple background (#7c3aed)
Filter dropdown is present with 'All types' default
Search input is present with placeholder text

steps.target: Template cards grouped by document type (collapsible accordion sections)
steps.expected_result: At least 5 document type sections visible (first 5 expanded by default), each with document type badge and template count. Seeded default templates (14 total) shown across groups.
steps.visual_check: Template cards with 12px border-radius, each showing name, green 'Active' badge, purple 'Default' badge, page size info, and version count in JetBrains Mono font. Accordion headers show document type labels with count badges.

journeys.name: Create a Custom Sales Invoice Template
journeys.description: Create a new SALES_INVOICE document template with all form fields populated, including page settings, branding toggles, HTML template body, and optional CSS/header/footer sections

steps.expected_result: Document Templates page loads
Template editor form opens with 'New Template' heading
steps.visual_check: Editor form visible with Document Type dropdown, Name input, Description textarea, Page Settings section, Branding section with toggle switches, HTML Template editor area (monospace JetBrains Mono font, 400px min-height), and collapsible CSS/Header/Footer editors. Save and Cancel buttons at bottom.

input_data.name: E2E Test Invoice Template
input_data.description: Custom invoice template created during E2E testing
input_data.htmlTemplate:
INVOICE

Invoice: {{document.number}}

Date: {{formatDate document.date}}

Customer: {{counterparty.name}}

{{#each lines}}{{/each}}
{{lineNumber @index}}{{description}}{{formatCurrency lineTotal ../metadata.currencyCode}}

Total: {{formatCurrency totals.total metadata.currencyCode}}

{{#if showBankDetails}}

Bank: {{company.bankName}}

{{/if}}

steps.expected_result: All form fields populated with provided values
CSS Styles editor expands showing textarea with monospace font

input_data.cssStyles: body { margin: 0; padding: 20px; } h1 { color: #333; } table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; } td { padding: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd; }

steps.expected_result: CSS styles entered in collapsible editor
Template created successfully, success toast shown, returns to list view
steps.visual_check: Success toast notification visible (e.g., 'Template created successfully'). Template list refreshed showing the new 'E2E Test Invoice Template' in the SALES_INVOICE group with green 'Active' badge. No purple 'Default' badge since isDefault was false.

steps.expected_result: 'E2E Test Invoice Template' appears in the SALES_INVOICE section alongside the seeded default template

journeys.name: Create a Credit Note Template for Filter Testing
journeys.description: Create a CREDIT_NOTE template so multiple document types have custom templates for filter and search testing

steps.expected_result: Document Templates page loads
Template editor form opens

input_data.name: E2E Credit Note Compact
input_data.description: Compact credit note layout for E2E testing

steps.expected_result: Form populated with Credit Note template data
Template created, success toast, list refreshed
steps.visual_check: Success toast visible. CREDIT_NOTE group now shows 2 templates — the seeded default and the new 'E2E Credit Note Compact' with green Active badge, A5/landscape metadata displayed.

journeys.name: Verify Template List Grouping and Badges
journeys.description: Verify templates are correctly grouped by document type with collapsible accordion sections, and badges (Active, Default, version count) are displayed correctly

steps.expected_result: Template list loads with grouped sections
SALES_INVOICE section visible with badge showing template count (2: seeded default + custom)

steps.target: Default template card in SALES_INVOICE section
steps.expected_result: Seeded 'Standard Invoice' template shows: green 'Active' badge, purple 'Default' badge, version count '0', page size 'A4/portrait'
steps.visual_check: Template card with 12px rounded corners. Name clearly visible with 2-line clamp. Green Active badge and purple Default badge side by side. Version count displayed in JetBrains Mono tabular-nums font. Three-dot overflow menu button visible on hover/focus.

steps.expected_result: Custom template shows: green 'Active' badge, NO purple 'Default' badge (isDefault=false), A4/portrait metadata
DELIVERY_NOTE section expands showing seeded default template
Standard Delivery Note template visible with Active and Default badges
DELIVERY_NOTE section collapses, hiding the template cards
steps.visual_check: Accordion section collapsed with only the header row visible showing DELIVERY_NOTE label and count badge. Other expanded sections still visible above/below.

journeys.name: Filter Templates by Document Type
journeys.description: Use the document type dropdown filter to narrow the template list to a specific document type, then clear the filter

steps.expected_result: Full template list loads showing all document types
Dropdown opens showing 'All types' plus 14 document type options

steps.target: SALES_INVOICE option in document type dropdown
steps.expected_result: List filters to show only SALES_INVOICE templates
steps.visual_check: Only SALES_INVOICE group visible with 2 templates (seeded 'Standard Invoice' + custom 'E2E Test Invoice Template'). All other document type groups hidden. Filter dropdown shows 'Sales Invoice' as selected value. Clear button appears near filters.

steps.expected_result: Exactly 2 template cards visible — only SALES_INVOICE type
Dropdown opens again

steps.target: PURCHASE_ORDER option in document type dropdown
steps.expected_result: List filters to PURCHASE_ORDER templates only
steps.visual_check: Only PURCHASE_ORDER group visible with 1 template (seeded 'Standard Purchase Order'). Previous SALES_INVOICE results gone.

steps.expected_result: All filters cleared, full template list restored with all document type groups

journeys.name: Search Templates by Name
journeys.description: Use the search input to find templates by partial name match, verify case-insensitive searching

steps.expected_result: Full template list loads
List filters to templates matching 'E2E' in name
steps.visual_check: Only 2 templates visible: 'E2E Test Invoice Template' (SALES_INVOICE) and 'E2E Credit Note Compact' (CREDIT_NOTE). Search input shows 'E2E' text. Other seeded templates hidden.

steps.expected_result: List filters to templates matching 'standard' (case-insensitive) — shows all seeded 'Standard ...' templates
steps.visual_check: Multiple seeded templates visible across different document type groups, all with names starting with 'Standard'. Custom E2E templates hidden. Results include 'Standard Invoice', 'Standard Credit Note', etc.

steps.expected_result: Search cleared, full template list restored

journeys.name: Edit an Existing Template
journeys.description: Open the custom invoice template for editing, change the description and page settings, save and verify the updates

steps.expected_result: Template list loads

steps.target: Three-dot overflow menu on 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card
steps.expected_result: Overflow menu opens showing: Edit, Preview, Clone, Set as Default, Deactivate
steps.visual_check: Dropdown menu visible with 5 action items. Edit option at top. Menu positioned relative to the overflow button.

steps.expected_result: Template editor form opens pre-populated with existing template data
steps.visual_check: Editor form showing 'Edit Template' heading. Document Type dropdown showing 'Sales Invoice' and DISABLED (grey, non-clickable). Name field shows 'E2E Test Invoice Template'. Description field shows existing description. Page settings show A4/portrait/25mm margins. Branding toggles in correct positions. HTML Template textarea populated with template HTML.

steps.expected_result: Document Type dropdown is disabled (immutable on edit per AC3)

input_data.description: Updated: Custom invoice template with enhanced styling for E2E testing

steps.expected_result: Description and margin fields updated
Show Logo toggled from true to false
Template updated successfully, success toast shown, returns to list view
steps.visual_check: Success toast notification visible (e.g., 'Template updated successfully'). Template list refreshed. 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card still visible in SALES_INVOICE group.

steps.target: Three-dot overflow menu on 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card
steps.expected_result: Overflow menu opens
Editor reopens showing updated values
Description shows 'Updated: Custom invoice template with enhanced styling for E2E testing'
Returns to list view without saving

journeys.name: Set a Template as Default
journeys.description: Set the custom E2E invoice template as default via overflow menu, verify the previous default loses its badge and the new one gains it

steps.expected_result: Template list loads. In SALES_INVOICE group, 'Standard Invoice' has purple Default badge

steps.target: Purple 'Default' badge on 'Standard Invoice' template card
steps.expected_result: 'Standard Invoice' currently shows the Default badge

steps.target: Three-dot overflow menu on 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card
steps.expected_result: Overflow menu opens with 'Set as Default' option visible
Template set as default, success toast, list refreshed
steps.visual_check: Success toast visible. 'E2E Test Invoice Template' now shows purple 'Default' badge. 'Standard Invoice' no longer shows Default badge (only Active badge remains). Only one template per document type has the Default badge.

steps.target: Purple 'Default' badge on 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card
steps.expected_result: 'E2E Test Invoice Template' now has the Default badge
'Standard Invoice' no longer has the Default badge

journeys.name: View Template Detail and Create a Version
journeys.description: Navigate to template detail view showing version management section, then create a new template version with selection criteria and override fields

steps.expected_result: Template list loads

steps.target: 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card (click on name/card body, not overflow menu)
steps.expected_result: Template detail view opens showing template info and Versions section
steps.visual_check: Detail view visible with template name, description, page settings summary. 'Versions (0)' section header with purple 'Create Version' button. Empty state message in versions area: dashed border box with message about creating first version.

steps.expected_result: Preview capability visible in the detail view
Version editor dialog opens as modal overlay
steps.visual_check: Modal dialog visible (max-width 2xl, max-height 85vh) with scrollable content. Selection Criteria section (2-column grid): Language Code, Branch Code, Number Series ID, Access Group, Customer Group ID inputs. Override Editors (4 collapsible sections). Email Settings section. Priority number input and Active toggle. Cancel and Create buttons at bottom.

steps.expected_result: Version form fields populated with French locale version data
HTML Override editor expands showing textarea
French HTML override entered

steps.target: Create button in version editor dialog
steps.expected_result: Version created successfully, dialog closes, versions list refreshed
steps.visual_check: Version editor dialog dismissed. Versions section now shows '(1)' count. New version card visible with: priority '10' in JetBrains Mono font, green 'Active' badge, selection criteria summary showing 'Lang: fr, Branch: PARIS'. Three-dot overflow menu on version card.

steps.expected_result: Shows 'Lang: fr' and 'Branch: PARIS' in criteria summary

journeys.name: Edit a Template Version
journeys.description: Edit the previously created version to change its priority and add an access group criterion

steps.expected_result: Template list loads

steps.target: 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card to enter detail view
steps.expected_result: Detail view opens with versions section showing 1 version

steps.target: Three-dot overflow menu on the French version card
steps.expected_result: Version overflow menu opens with: Edit, Preview, Clone, Activate/Deactivate, Delete

steps.target: Edit option in version overflow menu
steps.expected_result: Version editor dialog opens pre-populated with existing version data
steps.visual_check: Version editor dialog showing pre-filled fields: Language Code 'fr', Branch Code 'PARIS', Priority '10', Active toggle ON. Email Subject shows Handlebars template text. HTML Override section expanded showing French template HTML.

steps.expected_result: Priority changed to 20, Access Group set to SALES

steps.target: Update button in version editor dialog
steps.expected_result: Version updated successfully, dialog closes, version card refreshed
steps.visual_check: Version card now shows priority '20', criteria summary updated to include 'Group: SALES' alongside 'Lang: fr, Branch: PARIS'. Active badge still green.

journeys.name: Preview a Template as PDF
journeys.description: Generate a PDF preview of the custom invoice template using sample data, verify the PDF is displayed inline with download/print controls

steps.expected_result: Template list loads

steps.target: Three-dot overflow menu on 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card
steps.expected_result: Overflow menu opens
Template detail view opens with preview panel visible
Preview panel shows dashed border box with Eye icon and 'Click Generate Preview to see a PDF preview with sample data' message. Generate Preview button visible (purple).
steps.visual_check: Preview panel in initial state with dashed border container, Eye icon centered, instructional text, and purple 'Generate Preview' button.

steps.expected_result: Loading state shown while PDF generates
steps.visual_check: Spinner animation visible (purple #7c3aed). 'Generating PDF preview...' text below spinner. Generate Preview button disabled with spinner icon.

steps.expected_result: PDF rendered successfully in an iframe/object element. Three control buttons visible below: Download, Open in New Tab, Print. Regenerate button replaces Generate Preview button.
steps.visual_check: PDF document visible in iframe (responsive height). Invoice content rendered with sample data — 'INVOICE' heading, invoice number, customer name, line items table, totals. Three action buttons below: Download (with download icon), Open in New Tab (with external link icon), Print (with printer icon). 'Regenerate' outline button visible.

steps.expected_result: Download button is clickable

steps.target: Open in New Tab button in preview controls
steps.expected_result: Open in New Tab button is clickable
Print button is clickable

journeys.name: Preview a Specific Template Version
journeys.description: Generate a preview using a specific version's overrides (French locale version) to verify version-specific rendering

steps.expected_result: Template list loads

steps.target: 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card to enter detail view
steps.expected_result: Detail view with versions section visible, showing 1 version (French locale)

steps.target: Three-dot overflow menu on French version card
steps.expected_result: Version overflow menu opens

steps.target: Preview option in version overflow menu
steps.expected_result: Preview initiated for this specific version with overrides applied

steps.target: PDF preview iframe after loading completes
steps.expected_result: PDF rendered with French version's HTML override — 'FACTURE' heading visible instead of 'INVOICE'

journeys.name: Clone an Existing Template
journeys.description: Clone the custom invoice template, verify the clone form is pre-populated with the source template's data, save the clone with a new name

steps.expected_result: Template list loads

steps.target: Three-dot overflow menu on 'E2E Test Invoice Template' card
steps.expected_result: Overflow menu opens
Clone editor form opens pre-populated with source template data, name field modified to indicate clone
steps.visual_check: Editor form visible with 'Clone Template' heading. Document Type dropdown shows 'Sales Invoice' and IS ENABLED (can change type on clone). Name field pre-populated with source name (possibly with 'Copy of' prefix or '(Copy)' suffix). HTML Template textarea pre-populated with source template HTML. All branding toggles match source. isDefault checkbox unchecked.

steps.expected_result: Name updated to unique clone name
Cloned template created successfully, success toast, list refreshed
steps.visual_check: Success toast visible. SALES_INVOICE group now shows 3 templates: 'Standard Invoice' (seeded), 'E2E Test Invoice Template' (custom), and 'E2E Cloned Invoice Template' (new clone). Clone has green Active badge, no Default badge.

journeys.name: Verify Form Validation Errors
journeys.description: Test form validation by submitting with missing required fields and exceeding field length limits

steps.expected_result: Template list loads
Empty editor form opens
Validation errors shown for required fields
steps.visual_check: Field-level validation error messages visible in red below: Document Type (required), Name (required), HTML Template (required). Save button may be disabled or form shows error state. No success toast — form remains open.

steps.expected_result: Name and HTML Template still show required errors after attempting empty strings
Name accepted (min length 1)
Validation error on marginTop — max value is 100mm
steps.visual_check: Margin Top input shows red border/error state with validation message about maximum value (100). Other margin fields remain valid.

steps.expected_result: Returns to list view without saving. No template created.

journeys.name: Verify Duplicate Name Constraint (409 Conflict)
journeys.description: Attempt to create a template with the same name and document type as an existing template, verify 409 conflict error is shown

steps.expected_result: Template list loads
Editor form opens
Form fields populated with duplicate name+type combination
409 Conflict error displayed — 'A template with this name already exists for this document type'
steps.visual_check: Error toast or inline error message visible showing duplicate name conflict. Form remains open (not dismissed). Template list not refreshed with a duplicate entry.

steps.expected_result: Returns to list view. No duplicate template created.

steps.expected_result: List switches to show inactive templates

steps.target: 'E2E Cloned Invoice Template' card with gray 'Inactive' badge
steps.expected_result: Deactivated template visible with Inactive badge, overflow menu shows 'Activate' option instead of 'Deactivate'

Template reactivated, success toast

steps.expected_result: Active template list shown. SALES_INVOICE group shows 3 templates again including reactivated clone.
steps.visual_check: All 3 SALES_INVOICE templates visible again: 'Standard Invoice', 'E2E Test Invoice Template', 'E2E Cloned Invoice Template'. All showing green 'Active' badge.

steps.target: Three-dot overflow menu on French version card

journeys.name: Concept D Design System Visual Fidelity Check
journeys.description: Comprehensive visual verification that the Document Templates page adheres to the Concept D design system specifications: colours, typography, spacing, animations, and responsive behaviour

steps.expected_result: Document Templates page loads
steps.visual_check: Page background is #f4f2ff (light purple), NOT white or grey. Sidebar has purple active item highlight. Header is 56px height with purple 'N' logo mark.

steps.expected_result: Button uses primary purple (#7c3aed), 8px border-radius, white text
steps.visual_check: Primary 'Add Template' button with: background-color #7c3aed (violet-600), white text, rounded-lg (8px radius). On hover state: background darkens to #5b21b6 (violet-700).

steps.expected_result: Cards have 12px radius, custom shadow, proper typography
steps.visual_check: Template cards with: 12px border-radius (rounded-xl), subtle shadow (shadow-sm), white background. Plus Jakarta Sans font for card headings. Inter font for body text. Version count in JetBrains Mono (tabular-nums). Purple-tinted hover shadow on mouse-over.

steps.expected_result: Active badge is green, Default badge is purple (#ede9fe bg), Inactive badge is grey
steps.visual_check: Green 'Active' badge with green background tint. Purple 'Default' badge with violet/purple background tint (#ede9fe). Both badges have small text, rounded-full pill shape, consistent padding.

steps.target: Document type badge styling in accordion headers
steps.expected_result: Document type labels use purple-tinted badge background (#ede9fe)
Editor form opens
steps.visual_check: Editor form with: Plus Jakarta Sans headings. Form inputs with proper border styling and focus states (purple focus ring). Toggle switches with purple active colour. HTML Template textarea uses JetBrains Mono monospace font with minimum 400px height and 1.5 line-height. Collapsible sections with disclosure triangles.

steps.expected_result: Returns to list

notes: E12-1 and E12-3 are backend-only stories — frontend E2E coverage is limited to what's visible through E12-2's UI (e.g., seeded templates visible in list, PDF preview exercises the Puppeteer pipeline).
The database must be seeded with E12-3 default templates before running these tests. All 14 DocumentType values should have a seeded 'Standard ...' template.
Preview tests (j11, j12) depend on Puppeteer being initialised on the API server. These may need a longer timeout (up to 10s) for PDF generation.
The 'Show Inactive' toggle may filter to ONLY inactive templates (not all templates), per known issue #6 in E12-2 code review. Tests j16/j17 should account for this behaviour.
Visual checks reference Concept D design tokens: primary purple #7c3aed, hover purple #5b21b6, background #f4f2ff, badge purple bg #ede9fe.
Clone behaviour (j13): the Document Type dropdown should be enabled on clone (unlike edit where it is disabled), allowing the user to clone a template to a different document type.
Version delete (j18) is a hard-delete (permanent), unlike template delete which is a soft-delete (sets isActive=false).
